task_description: Write a technical specification for a real-time notification system that supports web push, email, SMS, and in-app notifications with user preference management.

input_data.context: The platform currently has no unified notification system. Notifications are sent ad-hoc from various services. The goal is to build a centralized notification service that handles routing, delivery, user preferences, and delivery tracking across all channels.

constraints.scale: 500K daily active users, up to 5M notifications per day
constraints.latency_requirement: In-app and push within 2 seconds, email within 30 seconds
constraints.compliance: GDPR-compliant, must support opt-out per channel
